ogTitle: Macmasters Beach vs Macquarie Fields: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Macmasters Beach and Macquarie Fields.
heading: Macmasters Beach vs Macquarie Fields — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macmasters Beach, New South Wales and Macquarie Fields, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macmasters Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Macquarie Fields (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macmasters Beach or Macquarie Fields safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macmasters Beach has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Macquarie Fields scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macmasters Beach scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Macquarie Fields scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macmasters Beach or Macquarie Fields?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macmasters Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
